inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: Your current age for determining the investment horizon until retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your current age for determining the investment horizon until retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım ufkunu emekliliğe kadar belirlemek için mevcut yaşınız.

inputs.label: Annual Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount you contribute annually to your HSA from your own funds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you contribute annually to your HSA from your own funds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kendi fonlarınızdan HSA'ya yıllık katkı tutarı.

inputs.label: Initial Balance
inputs.businessContext: Current balance already in the HSA account.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current balance already in the HSA account.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected average annual rate of return on HSA investments (before inflation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average annual rate of return on HSA investments (before inflation).
businessContext_i18n.tr: HSA yatırımlarında beklenen yıllık ortalama getiri oranı (enflasyon öncesi).

inputs.label: Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Your federal marginal income tax rate used to estimate tax savings on contributions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your federal marginal income tax rate used to estimate tax savings on contributions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katkılardaki vergi tasarrufunu tahmin etmek için federal marjinal gelir vergisi oranınız.

inputs.label: Years Until Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Number of years you plan to contribute before retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years you plan to contribute before retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik öncesi katkı yapmayı planladığınız yıl sayısı.

inputs.label: Employer Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Annual contribution from your employer to your HSA, if any.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual contribution from your employer to your HSA, if any.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
